name: ghoomo-platform
description: Ghoomo — Ride-sharing platform (monorepo: app + backend + web)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix app && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix web
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,app,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:app" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules app/node_modules backend/node_modules web/node_modules app/.expo backend/.build web/dist
